refresh.description: If `true` (the default) then refresh the affected shards to make this operation visible to search, if `wait_for` then wait for a refresh to make this operation visible to search, if `false` then do nothing with refreshes.

api_key.description: The credentials of the API key to clone. This is the secret value returned when the key was originally created.

name.description: A name for the cloned API key. If not provided, the name of the source key is used.

expiration.description: The expiration time for the cloned API key. By default, API keys never expire. Set to `null` to explicitly create a key with no expiration.

metadata.description: Arbitrary metadata to associate with the cloned API key. It supports nested data structure. Within the metadata object, keys beginning with `_` are reserved for system usage.
